signals: NVIDIA presenta Rubin como su plataforma de próxima generación para escalar IA en todos los dominios y dispositivos.
OpenAI transforma Codex en un agente capaz de interactuar con aplicaciones de escritorio y herramientas de usuario.
Google DeepMind prioriza la eficiencia con Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite y modelos de audio de baja latencia.
Investigación de Anthropic en Nature revela que los LLM pueden transmitir sesgos mediante señales subliminales.
La política energética de EE. UU. se posiciona como el pilar fundamental para sostener la infraestructura de IA.
risks: El aprendizaje subliminal en modelos de lenguaje introduce riesgos de alineación difíciles de detectar.
La complejidad de las redes de entrega de energía (PDN) limita el rendimiento de los chips de IA modernos.
Vulnerabilidades críticas de seguridad en dispositivos edge ante la expansión masiva de la IoT.
watch: Resultados del hackathon de Google DeepMind para evaluar el progreso real hacia la AGI.
Impacto de la integración de 'AI Mode' en Chrome sobre la navegación web tradicional.
Lanzamiento comercial de la arquitectura Rubin de NVIDIA tras su presentación en el CES.

items.title: Exploring the Hidden Complexity of Modern Power Electronics Design – A Siemens White Paper
items.summary: Review the specifications of any state-of-the-art microcontroller and you will discover the high dynamic current the device can consume. Examining the high clock rates and low tolerable voltage drop will lead you to the all-important power delivery network, or PDN. Components here include power planes, layer stack-up, decoupling… Read More The post Exploring the Hidden Complexity of Modern Power Electronics Design – A Siemens White Paper appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: La complejidad en el diseño de PDN es el nuevo cuello de botella físico para microcontroladores de alto rendimiento.

items.title: Research we co-authored on subliminal learning—how LLMs can pass on traits like preferences or misalignment through hidden signals in data—was published toda...
items.summary: Research we co-authored on subliminal learning—how LLMs can pass on traits like preferences or misalignment through hidden signals in data—was published today in . Read the paper: [nature.com/articles/s4158](https://t.co/b1BYwcW9dH) Quote Owain Evans @OwainEvans_UK Apr 15 Our paper on Subliminal Learning was just published in Nature! Last July we released our preprint. It showed that LLMs can transmit traits (e.g. liking owls) through data that is unrelated to that trait (numbers that appear meaningless). What’s new?![Image 4: 🧵](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg)
items.why: Investigación en Nature demuestra que modelos pueden heredar y transmitir rasgos no deseados mediante datos subliminales.

items.title: Watch Jensen Huang unveil the latest breakthroughs in AI and accelerated computing, and more in the [#NVIDIAGTC](https://x.com/hashtag/NVIDIAGTC?src=hashtag_...
items.summary: Watch Jensen Huang unveil the latest breakthroughs in AI and accelerated computing, and more in the [#NVIDIAGTC](https://x.com/hashtag/NVIDIAGTC?src=hashtag_click) 2026 keynote. Now live ![Image 4: ⬇️](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2b07.svg)
items.why: NVIDIA GTC 2026 marca el estándar de la industria para el futuro de la computación acelerada y el hardware de IA.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
items.summary: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS introduce control granular para voz sintética expresiva y de alta fidelidad.

items.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
items.why: La creación de un marco cognitivo para medir la AGI busca estandarizar la evaluación del progreso hacia inteligencia general.

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Woman working with a large tool. On the left are the Google and MIT FutureTech logos, "AI for the Economy Forum", and "Innovation and Adaption in the New Era"
items.why: Foro sobre economía e IA enfocado en la adaptación laboral y la innovación en la nueva era digital.

items.title: NVIDIA Rubin Platform, Open Models, Autonomous Driving: NVIDIA Presents Blueprint for the Future at CES
items.summary: NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at the Fontainebleau Las Vegas to open CES 2026, declaring that AI is scaling into every domain and every device. “Computing has been fundamentally reshaped as a result of accelerated computing, as a result of artificial intelligence,” Huang said. “What that means is some $10 trillion […]
items.why: La plataforma Rubin de NVIDIA define la hoja de ruta para escalar IA en dispositivos y conducción autónoma.

items.title: Effective Defense Against Hacks at the Edge
items.summary: IoT permeates every aspect of our lives, in payment systems, access authorization, vehicles, utilities, factories, hospitals, and in so many other fields. Which makes these systems attractive targets for hacking and social disruption while also challenging to protect given the highly constrained resources that many such… Read More The post Effective Defense Against Hacks at the Edge appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: La defensa contra hackeos en el borde es crítica ante la proliferación de sistemas IoT en sectores sensibles.

items.title: One month ago, President Trump visited Texas on unleashing AMERICAN energy dominance. DRILL, BABY, DRILL. ![Image 6: 🔥](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f...
items.summary: One month ago, President Trump visited Texas on unleashing AMERICAN energy dominance. DRILL, BABY, DRILL. ![Image 6: 🔥](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f525.svg) FDA is moving proactively to advance potential therapies to address America’s mental health crisis. It’s time for new approaches. “I…held my son while he bled to death.” 12-year-old Dereon James Robinson and 9-year-old Mikhail Lee Smith were killed by an illegal alien driving under the influence. These boys had their whole lives ahead of them. Instead, they were senselessly taken from this world by What does the American flag mean to you?![Image 12: 🇺🇸](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f1fa-1f1f8.svg) Product of USA Rodeo Champions share their straight from the arena answers: freedom, grit, and the unbreakable spirit that built this country!

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.
items.why: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live reduce la latencia para lograr interacciones de voz humanas más naturales y fluidas.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.why: Flash-Lite se posiciona como el modelo más eficiente de la serie Gemini 3 para implementaciones masivas a bajo coste.

items.title: Codex for (almost) everything. It can now use apps on your Mac, connect to more of your tools, create images, learn from previous actions, remember how you l...
items.summary: Codex for (almost) everything. It can now use apps on your Mac, connect to more of your tools, create images, learn from previous actions, remember how you like to work, and take on ongoing and repeatable tasks.
items.why: La evolución de Codex hacia un agente con capacidad de acción en el SO marca el inicio de la IA proactiva.

items.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
items.summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.
items.why: Investigación proactiva sobre manipulación dañina en finanzas y salud para establecer salvaguardas en modelos.

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.why: AI Mode en Chrome integra la IA directamente en la experiencia de navegación web diaria.

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Example images made with Personal Intelligence
items.why: Nuevas funciones de personalización en la app Gemini para mejorar la creación de imágenes generativas.
